What We Do

Skilled trades, under one roof.

From foundations through to finishing touches — we handle every stage of your build, so you only have one team to deal with.

01 / Structural

Extensions & Porches

Single and double-storey extensions, porches, garage conversions and full renovations — built start to finish.

  • Rear & side extensions
  • Brick porches
  • Garage conversions
02 / Brickwork

Brickwork & Walls

Boundary walls, retaining walls, garden walls and brickwork repairs — clean lines and tight joints every time.

  • Boundary & retaining walls
  • Repointing
  • Brickwork repairs
03 / Outdoor

Patios & Paving

Indian sandstone, porcelain and traditional flagstone patios laid properly on a full mortar bed.

  • Sandstone & porcelain
  • Pointing & sealing
  • Drainage included
04 / Outdoor

Decking, Fencing & Landscaping

Hardwood and pressure-treated decking, slatted screens, fencing, lawns and full garden transformations.

  • Decking & raised platforms
  • Slatted screens & fencing
  • Garden landscaping
05 / Internal

Tiling & Bathrooms

Full bathroom installations, wet rooms, kitchen splashbacks and floor tiling — laid level with crisp grout lines.

  • Bathroom & wet room fits
  • Wall & floor tiling
  • Metro, porcelain, natural stone
06 / Groundworks

Bases, Steps & Driveways

Reinforced concrete bases for hot tubs and outbuildings, formal sandstone steps, block-paved driveways.

  • Hot tub & shed bases
  • Formal entrance steps
  • Block paving & driveways

Why SPD Builders

Built right, first time.

No corner cutting, no chasing us for updates, no surprise costs. Just proper builds, properly finished — and a clean site at the end of every day.

01

Proper Preparation

Every patio, base or build starts with a properly excavated, compacted sub-base — the bit you can't see is the bit that lasts.

02

Clear, Honest Quotes

You'll get a written quote with every cost broken out. What we quote is what you pay — no hidden extras.

03

Tidy Site, Every Day

Tools away, waste managed, no abandoned skips. Your garden stays a garden while we work in it.

04

All Trades In-House

Brickwork, groundworks, tiling, decking, fencing — handled by us so your project runs to one timeline, not five.

05

Local & Reachable

Based locally, easy to get hold of, and on the end of the phone after the job's done if you ever need us.

How It Works

From first call to finished build.

1

Get in Touch

Call, WhatsApp, or drop us a message. Tell us what you've got in mind.

2

Site Visit & Quote

Free, no-obligation visit. We measure up and email a written quote within a few days.

3

Book In

Pick a start date that works for you. We'll order materials and confirm timings.

4

Built & Finished

We get on with the build, keep the site tidy, and hand it over once you're happy.

Common Questions

The questions we get asked.

Yes — every quote is free with no obligation. We'll come and see the job, talk it through, and send a written breakdown by email within a few days.
Yes, fully covered with public liability insurance. We're happy to share our certificate before any work starts.
Full job. Brickwork, groundworks, tiling, decking, fencing — we cover the trades in-house. For specialist work (electrics, plumbing) we bring in our trusted contacts and project-manage them.
A porch typically takes 2–4 weeks depending on size and finish. Single-storey extensions are usually 8–12 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline with your quote.
Bank transfer in stages — usually a deposit to secure your slot and materials, then balance on completion when you're happy. Larger builds are split into staged payments.
We keep our sites as tidy as we can. Tools are packed away every evening, materials stacked neatly, and we clear all waste at the end of the job.
